cloud_tts_missing_api_key: Cloud TTS is missing an API key. Set it in admin → Voice & Avatar.
how_are_you_feeling: How are you feeling right now?
keep_working_agent_arrives: You can keep working — they'll appear here when they arrive.
listening_ended_no_speech: Listening ended without picking up any speech. If this happens immediately, the page may need to be served over HTTPS.
load_case_from_settings: Please load a case from settings.
mic_blocked: Microphone blocked. Allow mic access for this site, and ensure the page is served over HTTPS.
no_microphone: No microphone detected. Plug one in or check OS audio input.
no_response_from_llm: (no response from LLM — check server logs)
no_speech_heard: Did not hear anything. Try speaking closer to the mic.
no_stt_language: No STT language configured. Set one in Settings → Voice & Avatar before pressing-to-talk.
no_voice_configured_agent: No voice configured for this agent persona. Set one in Settings → Agent Personas.
no_voice_configured_case: No voice configured. Set a Case voice in the Case editor, or a default voice on the Patient persona.
start_conversation_with_patient: Start a conversation with your patient
stt_network_error: Speech recognition could not reach the network service. Check internet/firewall.
stt_not_supported_browser: Speech recognition is not supported in this browser. Use Chrome or Edge over HTTPS.
stt_not_supported_short: Speech recognition not supported in this browser
type_message_to_agent: Type a message to communicate with the {role}
type_message_to_begin_history: Type a message below to begin taking the patient's history
voice_default_not_configured: No voice is configured for this speaker — playing the platform default voice “{voice}”.
voice_language_mismatch: The configured voice "{voice}" does not speak the session language ({language}). Pick a matching voice in Settings → Agent Personas or the case editor.
voice_not_valid_for_engine: Voice not valid for this engine. Set a default in admin → Avatars & voices.
voice_wrong_provider: The configured voice “{voice}” needs the “{provider}” engine, which is not available on this server. Configured voices are never substituted — fix the engine in Settings → Voice, or re-pick the voice in the case editor / Agent Personas.
wait_consultant_1: Reviewing the chart and current vitals
wait_consultant_3: On the way to the bedside
wait_relative_1: Family on the way from the waiting area
